sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 96:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 96:1
items.html: ZA of the Rosh is called Hotem [nose]. The light in it is called “smell,” because the ten Sefirot of Rosh are called Galgalta, Eynaim, Ozen, Hotem, and Peh. (Part 3, Chapter 11, item 2)
